---
title: "Chipotle Crema"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Sauces and Condiments"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   2/3 cup mayonnaise

-   1/3 cup sour cream

-   1/4 cup chipotle hot sauce Cholula

-   2 tablespoons hot sauce Texas Pete or Frank\'s RedHot

**Directions:**

1.  Mix all of the ingredients together in a small bowl. Store in a
    squeeze bottle. For best results, chill for an hour so the flavors
    can blend.
